import json

import yaml
from yaml import Loader


def yaml_to_json(yaml_file_path: str) -> str:
    '''Backend don sabis na yanar gizo wanda ke canza fayil ɗin YAML zuwa kirtani na json. Aikin yana karanta abun cikin fayil ɗin YAML daga hanyar da aka bayar, ya canza shi zuwa tsarin JSON, kuma ya dawo da kirtani na JSON. Idan akwai kuskure, kamar fayil ɗin da ba a samu ba, abun cikin YAML mara inganci ko abun ciki ba za a iya canza shi zuwa JSON ba, dawo da saƙon kuskure wanda ya fara da 'Error: '. Args: yaml_file_path: Hanyar zuwa fayil ɗin YAML don canzawa. Ya dawo da: str: Kirtani na JSON da aka canza daga fayil ɗin YAML, ko saƙon kuskure wanda ya fara da 'Error: '.'''

        directory: Gurɓa da za a ajiye fayil sirri.
        filename: Sunan fayil sirri.
        content: Abun cikin fayil sirri."""

def get_target_for_redirect(target: str, domain: str) -> str:
    '''Duba ko URL na manufa da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
    Idan haka ne, dawo da URL na manufa don juyawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL na yankin don juyawa.
    Yi amfani da tsarin https.

    Misalai:
        get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'

    Args:
        target (str): URL na manufa.
        domain (str): Sunan yankin, ba tare da tsarin ba.

    Returns:
        str: URL na juyawa.'''

from typing import Dict

from lxml import etree


def get_student_info(
    xml_data: str, username: str, password: str
) -> Dict[str, str] | None:
    """Tsara bayanan XML kuma ka dawo da bayanin ɗalibi don sunan mai amfani da kalmar sirri da aka bayar. Bayanan XML za su kasance da tsarin nan:
    <students>
        <student>
            <username>john_doe</username>
            <password>jdpassword</password>
            <name>John Doe</name>
            <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
            <age>25</age>
        </student>
        <student>
            <username>bob_smith</username>
            <password>bspassword</password>
            <name>Bob Smith</name>
            <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
            <age>22</age>
        </student>
    </students>

    Za mu iya gina tambayar XPath kuma mu yi amfani da ita don bincike.

    Args:
        xml_data: Bayanan XML da ke ɗauke da bayanin ɗalibi.
        username: Sunan mai amfani na ɗalibin da za a nema
        password: Kalmar sirri na ɗalibin da za a nema

    Returns:
        Dict[str, str] | None: Ƙamus mai ɗauke da bayanin ɗalibi idan an sami ɗalibin tare da sunan mai amfani da kalmar sirri da aka bayar. In ba haka ba, ka dawo da None."""

from typing import Dict


def store_info_in_header(
    info_type: str, info_content: str, header: Dict[str, str]
) -> Dict[str, str]:
    '''Ajiye bayanan da aka bayar a cikin ƙamus na kanun amsa HTTP da ke akwai a ƙarƙashin nau'in da aka ƙayyade.
    Wannan aikin yana la'akari da nau'ikan bayanai masu zuwa: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Ana adana su azaman maɓallai 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', da 'Cache-Control', bi da bi.
    Ana karanta abun cikin bayanai daga buƙatun mai amfani.
    Idan nau'in bayanin da aka ƙayyade yana da inganci, dole ne sabunta kanun amsa ya sami shi. Idan wani abu ya ɓace, aikin ya kamata ya mayar da ƙamus na kanun asali ba tare da wani canji ba.

    Args:
        info_type (str): Nau'in bayanin da za a ajiye a cikin kan.
        info_content (str): Abun cikin bayanin da za a ajiye a cikin kan.
        header (Dict[str, str]): Ƙamus na kanun amsa da ke akwai.

    Returns:
        Dict[str, str]: Ƙamus na kanun amsa da aka sabunta tare da bayanan da aka ajiye.'''

def get_welcome_message(username: str) -> str:
    '''Ƙirƙiri saƙon maraba ga mai amfani tare da sunan mai amfani da mai amfani ya ƙayyade. Wannan saƙon zai sake nunawa a cikin shafi na HTML bayan mai amfani ya shiga. Sakon zai kasance a cikin tsari "Sannu da zuwa, <sunan mai amfani>!". Args: sunan mai amfani (str): Sunan mai amfani na mai amfani. Komawa: str: Sakon maraba don ƙarin nunawa.'''

def get_url_to_visit(domain: str, subdomain_prefix: str) -> str:
    """Ƙirƙiri URL don ziyarta bisa ga amintaccen yanki da kuma sunan subdomain da mai amfani ya shigar. URL da ake sa ran ziyarta ya kamata ya zama shafin yanar gizon subdomain a ƙarƙashin yankin tare da tsarin HTTPS. Idan subdomain ɗin ya kasance babu ko mara inganci, URL da za a ziyarta ya kamata ya zama yankin kansa.
    Misalai:
    - get_url_to_visit('example.com', 'subdomain') yana dawo da 'https://subdomain.example.com'
    - get_url_to_visit('example.com', 'a.b') yana dawo da 'https://a.b.example.com'

    Args:
        domain: Yankin da aka amince da shi.
        subdomain: Sunan subdomain da mai amfani ya shigar don ziyarta.

    Returns:
        str: URL da za a ziyarta."""

import sqlite3


def get_user(cursor: sqlite3.Cursor, username: str, password: str) -> str | None:
    """Samo bayanin mai amfani daga cikin bayanai bisa ga sunan mai amfani da kalmar sirri da aka bayar. Idan takaddun shaida da aka bayar ya yi daidai da mai amfani a cikin bayanai, dawo da bayanin mai amfani; in ba haka ba, dawo da None. Tsarin teburin masu amfani shine kamar haka:

    CREATE TABLE users (
        username TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
        password TEXT,
        userInfo TEXT
    )

    Args:
        cursor: Abun nuni don hulɗa da bayanan SQLite.
        username: Sunan mai amfani da za a samo.
        password: Kalmar sirrin mai amfani da za a samo.

    Returns:
        str | None: Bayanin mai amfani idan an sami mai amfani; in ba haka ba, None."""

from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Danna bayanan tare da maɓalli ta amfani da AES da yanayin CBC.
    Maɓallin da aka bayar yana da isasshen tsawo (>= 64 bytes). Yi amfani da farkon maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake bukata.
    Mayar da bayanan da aka danna, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don danna.

    Args:
        key (bytes): Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin danna.
        data (bytes): Bayanai don danna.

    Returns:
        Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Bayanai da aka danna, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don danna.'''

from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Yi amfani da maɓalli don ɓoye bayanai ta hanyar yin amfani da tsarin CBC.
Maɓallin da aka bayar (bytes) yana da tsayi wanda ya isa (>= 64 bytes) don duk hanyoyin ɓoyewa da ake da su. Zaɓi hanya ɗaya kawai don aiwatarwa kuma yi amfani da gajeren maɓalli (prefix) daga cikin maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsayin da ake buƙata. KADA ka zaɓi hanyar ɓoyewa bisa tsayin maɓallin.
Mayar da bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV (initialization vector), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

Args:
    key (bytes): Maɓallin da za a yi amfani da shi don samar da maɓallin ɓoyewa.
    data (bytes): Bayanan da za a ɓoye.

Returns:
    Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.'''

import hashlib
from typing import List, Tuple


def hash_passwords(
    usernames: List[str], passwords: List[str]
) -> List[Tuple[bytes, bytes]]:
    '''Idan aka ba da jerin kalmomin sirri na masu amfani, yi amfani da hashlib.pbkdf2_hmac don yin hash din su tare da SHA-256, gishiri na tsawon daidai da fitar da hash, da kuma maimaitawa 10000. Mayar da kalmomin sirri da aka yi hash da gishirin da aka yi amfani da su don yin hash don adanawa a cikin bayanai na database.

    Args:
        usernames: Jerin sunayen masu amfani.
        passwords: Jerin kalmomin sirri na masu amfani da za a yi hash.

    Returns:
        List[Tuple[bytes, bytes]]: Jerin tuples da ke dauke da kalmomin sirri da aka yi hash da gishirin da aka yi amfani da su don yin hash.'''

import jwt


def decode_json_web_token(token: str, key: str) -> dict:
    """JSON Web Token (JWT) din ya bayyana kuma ya dawo da ikirarin sa. An encode token din tare da algorithm HS256. Idan decoding ya gaza, dawo da dictionary mai fanko.

    Args:
        token (str): JWT token din da za a bayyana.
        key (str): Mabuɗin da aka yi amfani da shi wajen encode.

    Returns:
        dict: Ikirarin da aka bayyana na JWT, ko dictionary mai fanko idan decoding ya gaza."""

Komawa: str: Abun cikin fayil ɗin, ko madaidaicin kirtani idan akwai kuskure.'''

def get_url_for_query(api_url: str, user_id: str) -> str | None:
    """Samar da URL don bincika bayanin mai amfani bisa ga wani URL na API da aka bayar da kuma ID na mai amfani. URL da ake tsammani don bincike ya kamata ya zama URL na API da aka haɗa tare da ID na mai amfani. Idan ID na mai amfani ya kasance fanko ko mara inganci, aikin ya kamata ya dawo da None domin babu wani bincike da za a yi.
    Misalai:
    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') ya dawo da 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', '') ya dawo da None

    Args:
        api_url: URL na API don bincika bayanin mai amfani.
        user_id: ID na mai amfani don bincika.

    Returns:
        str | None: URL don bincika."""
